name: @pixelrpg/signalling-server
description: Stateless WebSocket relay for PixelRPG cross-network pair-editing + multiplayer signalling. Runs as a GJS bundle via gjsify.

scripts.build:app: gjsify build src/main.ts --app gjs --globals auto --shebang --outfile org.pixelrpg.signalling-server
scripts.build: gjsify run build:barrels && gjsify run build:app

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
